summary_en: 1.8M shares (2.2% of S/O), ¥3.4B upper limit, May 15, 2026–Mar 31, 2027 execution window, open-market method. Rationale: support ROE 8% target via total payout ratio of 100% (dividends + buybacks) until goal achieved.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: Japan Securities Finance Co., Ltd. announced on May 14, 2026 that its board of directors has authorized the acquisition of up to 1.8 million treasury shares (2.2% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥3.4 billion. The acquisition window runs from May 15, 2026 through March 31, 2027, using open-market purchases. The company stated its acquisition policy targets a total payout ratio of 100% through dividends and share buybacks until reaching an ROE of 8%. As of April 30, 2026, Japan Securities Finance held 1.4 million treasury shares against 81.6 million shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
